title: Healing Pretty Good
description: Adds RPG-like Heart Drops, Heart Crystals, and Heart Upgrades
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8a5f8695-7e4f-42ee-aff9-a44f49663696.png)](https://shorturl.at/xbl6X)

Discord Server for talking about my mods, update progress, or reporting bugs/issues: Click Here

Wiki for Healing Pretty Good: Click Here


 

----Update 1.3.0! Now with Mod Compat and Heart Lanterns!----

Another Mod Update! Now there are new building blocks with polished heart crystal, heart lanterns, and heart crystal apples. There has also been a huge bug fix that now allows health upgrades to play nicely with mods such as Origins (where as before it would mess with the health). Happy Valentine's Day!

 

----Update 1.2.0! Now with Empty Heart Containers!----

Another Mod Update! Now there are Advancements, Decreasing Heart Items, a semi-farmable way to get shards, and Christmas textures (hearts become candy canes during December)! With the Heart Container, you can store your own health as an item, allowing you to decrease your health down to 1 heart and give your heart to other players. Be careful with temporary hearts however, as the heart container will consume them and won't give you back a heart item (although it will prioritize permanent hearts first).

----Update 1.1.0! Now with Heart Crystals!----

The mod has been updated to add Heart Crystals, which can be used to craft permanent and temporary health upgrades for the player. Now, there are also configs that control how the health upgrades work, so you can change how many permanent and temporary hearts you can get and how much health each gives you.
Features that existed prior to the update are health drops from mobs and heart bottles

 

 

Curseforge Version here: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/healing-pretty-good

 

FAQ

Q: Why is the newest version of HPG not the same as 1.20.1
A: That is only temporary, I plan to port the newest version up

Q: Forge Version?
A: For the time being, Forge isn't my primary concern, It's a possibility that 1.5+ won't be ported

Q: Ender Souls are very uncommon/can't find them
A: The Ender Dragon always drops ~5. On versions below 1.5, they will be dropped at the location the dragon dies in the air. In version 1.5+, they will appear above the Dragon Egg. Ender Mobs also drop souls, albeit much less frequently. In 1.5+ this is handled via a loot table, which is found in Koala Lib

Q: Why are Ender Souls part of KoalaLib?
A: I have plans to use them for other mods as a resource, so I added them as a part of the library, albiet one that will hide itself unless used.
